title: A Sky Full of Stars for a Roof
actors: Giuliano Gemma, Mario Adorf, Magda Konopka
plot: Two drifters meet and soon become travelling companions. But one of them, Tim (Gemma), is being chased by a crazed killer and his band of gunmen to settle an old score. The two (Adore being the other) are chased through the west, ...
